statement.p: Suppose the profit margin is 25\% and the wholesale price is {\$16.95}\text{.} Write an equation that could be used to find the shelf price. Then find the shelf price.

solution.p: We start with the equation s(1-m)=w and substitute in what we know. The value for m should be 0.25 and the value for w should be 16.95\text{.} So we have the equation
Now to solve for s\text{,} divide on each side by 0.75\text{:}
